s: In 2010, Robert Coello suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.760, WHIP 1.590, SO 5, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> TOR).
In 2012, Robert Coello suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 12.790, WHIP 2.210, SO 11, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined TOR.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> LAA).
In 2013, Robert Coello suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.710, WHIP 1.290, SO 23, WAR 0.400. Notable context: Joined LAA.
